highlights.headline: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights) 2025/10/27 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Donovan Mitchell scored 35 points in just 29 minutes, and the Cleveland Cavaliers beat the Detroit Pistons 116-95 on Monday night for their third straight victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Donovan Mitchell scores 35 as the Cavaliers beat the Pistons 116-95 for their 3rd straight win

highlights.description: Orlando Magic vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Orlando Magic vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights) 2025/10/27 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Tyrese Maxey scored 43 points, including eight straight during a crucial fourth-quarter stretch, and rookie VJ Edgecombe added 26 points as the Philadelphia 76ers beat the Orlando Magic 136-124 without Joel Embiid to improve to 3-0.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tyrese Maxey scores 43 points to lead 76ers past Magic 136-124 without Joel Embiid

headlines.description: — Ayo Dosunmu scored 21 points, Josh Giddey had 18 points and 13 rebounds and the Chicago Bulls rallied to top the Atlanta Hawks 128-123 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dosunmu scores 21 points to lead Bulls to 128-123 win over Hawks

headlines.description: — Tari Eason scored 22 points, Alperen Sengun added 21 points, six rebounds and six assists, and the Houston Rockets beat the Brooklyn Nets 137-109 on Monday night for their first victory of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rockets rout the winless Nets 137-109 for their first victory of the season

headlines.description: — Anfernee Simons made six 3-pointers and scored 25 points, and the Boston Celtics earned their first victory over the season by pulling away to beat the New Orleans Pelicans 122-90 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Simons scores 25 points as the Celtics earn their first victory by beating the Pelicans 122-90

events.name: Toronto Raptors at San Antonio Spurs

headlines.description: — Victor Wembanyama had 24 points and 15 rebounds, and the San Antonio Spurs defeated the Toronto Raptors 121-103 on Monday night to match the best start in franchise history.
headlines.shortLinkText: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs move to 4-0 with a 121-103 win over the Raptors

headlines.description: — Isaiah Hartenstein had 16 points and 12 points — and scored Oklahoma City’s only two field goals of the final 8:28 — as the Thunder withstood a furious Dallas rally to beat the Mavericks 101-94 on Monday night to improve to 4-0.
headlines.shortLinkText: Thunder withstand furious Mavericks rally to win 101-94, improving to 4-0

headlines.description: — Lauri Markkanen scored a career-high 51 points, the first Jazz player to reach 50 in the regular season since Karl Malone in 1998, and Utah beat the Phoenix Suns 138-134 in overtime on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Markkanen scores a career-high 51 points to help the Jazz outlast the Suns 138-134 in OT

headlines.description: — Jamal Murray scored 23 of his 43 points in the third quarter and Nikola Jokic had a triple-double as the Denver Nuggets beat the short-handed Minnesota Timberwolves 127-114 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Murray scores 43 points, Jokic has triple-double as Nuggets beat Timberwolves 127-114
